name: Cloud CLI Persistence
description: Persists cloud CLI authentication state across container rebuilds by validating host credential mounts and providing helper utilities for AWS, Azure, GCP, and GitHub CLI

providers.description: Comma-separated list of cloud providers to configure (aws, azure, gcp, github)

validateMounts.description: Validate that host credential directories are mounted into the container at install time

printMountConfig.description: Print the required devcontainer.json mounts configuration after setup
